steps.t: Odda is waiting to speak with you inside the Stangard Mead Hall.
Stanric stands at the head of the Stangard mead hall. Stanric wishes to discuss the capture of Dargum, and decide an appropriate course of action.
Sithric stands beside Stanric in the Stangard Mead Hall. Sithric wishes to discuss the capture of the Uruk and respond to Stanric's judgement.
Gadda stands before Stanric and Sithric in the Mead Hall. Gadda wishes to discuss the result of Stanric and Sithric's council.
